source_collections_scope_check.name: source_collections_scope_check
source_collections_scope_check.value: ("source_collections"."scope" = 'system' AND "source_collections"."learner_id" IS NULL AND "source_collections"."org_id" IS NULL AND "source_collections"."class_id" IS NULL) OR ("source_collections"."scope" = 'private' AND "source_collections"."learner_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("source_collections"."scope" IN ('household', 'org') AND "source_collections"."org_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("source_collections"."scope" = 'class' AND "source_collections"."class_id" IS NOT NULL)

source_mappings_has_target.name: source_mappings_has_target
source_mappings_has_target.value: "source_mappings"."topic_id" IS NOT NULL OR "source_mappings"."component_id" IS NOT NULL
